layers.prompt_used: IMAGE 1 is the authoritative NEW PRODUCT. Preserve its exact identity, shape, proportions, colors, materials and details. Transferable style: dominant_colors: #F7F7F5, #C4A265, #FFFFFF, #2C2C2C, #E0E0E0; lighting: Soft, diffuse high-key lighting; even illumination minimizing harsh shadows; subtle specular highlights on product surfaces to enhance texture and premium feel.; composition: Centered, symmetrical balance; products arranged on a stepped, marble-like pedestal; hierarchical layout with brand header, large central headline, product showcase in the middle, and action-oriented footer.; background: Textured off-white surface resembling a classical wall with faint, low-opacity architectural reliefs (columns, moldings); clean, bright aesthetic suggesting a professional or clinical environment.; mood: Elegant, professional, luxurious, clinical, trustworthy, refined, high-end.; typography: Elegant serif fonts for main headlines and brand identity conveying heritage; clean sans-serif fonts for informational text and details; gold and dark grey text colors; strong visual hierarchy with varying font weights and sizes.; decorative_elements: Faint classical architectural reliefs, Gold connecting lines and dots, Rounded rectangular callout bubbles, Gold horizontal dividers, Vertical side navigation tab, Coupon-style price tags. Create a premium square e-commerce hero main image, strong product focus, clean hierarchy, no copied text or logos.

这是一张带有彩色矩形线框的图片编辑任务。只修改矩形框内的区域，框外的产品、构图、光影和背景保持不变。最终图片中移除彩色矩形框和透明色块。
